MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk D Feinberg ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Gerald Shaughnessy, Trustee, present
Attorney, David Foran Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kimberly Hess, is present.
Attorney, Rebecca Licht, Esq. and Joan Haratani, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-1-2010 is vacated.
